title: About KWIN City
description: Learn about the KWIN City vision and mission

blocks.title: About KWIN City
blocks.subtitle: Knowledge, Wellbeing, Innovation
blocks.content: A vision for sustainable urban development

blocks.title: Our Vision
blocks.content: KWIN City represents a paradigm shift in urban development, combining three interconnected pillars: Knowledge generation through research and education, Wellbeing through sustainable living and healthcare, and Innovation through cutting-edge industrial clusters.

items.title: Research & Development
items.description: Foster innovation through world-class R&D institutions

items.title: Sustainable Growth
items.description: Develop 465+ acres with net-zero environmental impact

items.title: Employment
items.description: Create 100,000+ direct jobs across multiple sectors
